shows.name: Upstairs at Helium: Ahmed Al-Kadri
shows.desc: Ahmed Al-Kadri is a Yemeni-American comedian based in LA who has built a following on TikTok and Instagram with several viral videos. He has been featured on Buzzfeed, plays Liam on the series “David Diamondhands,” and his comedy special “Special Not Special” is on YouTube. Note: the Upstairs showroom is 21+ with a two-item minimum.

shows.name: Stand-Up Comedy w/ Ahmed Al-Kadri
shows.lineup: Ahmed Al-Kadri, Jay Badlani, Avnish Naik
shows.desc: Comedian Ahmed Al-Kadri performs in Atlanta for the first time to do an hour! His stand-up blends his cultural upbringing, everyday absurdities, and straight-up goofy fun. You may have seen him on the series David Diamondhands, OFTV, or as the HR guy in the sexual-harassment training videos you have to watch for your new corporate job.

shows.name: Ahmed Al-Kadri at The Lost Church
shows.desc: Ahmed Al-Kadri brings his high-energy, heartfelt stand-up to The Lost Church in San Francisco. A Yemeni-American comedian based in LA, blending cultural upbringing, everyday absurdities, and goofy fun.

shows.name: Ahmed Al-Kadri at Irvine Improv
shows.desc: Ahmed Al-Kadri is a Yemeni-American comedian based in Los Angeles whose stand-up blends his cultural upbringing, everyday absurdities, and straight-up goofy fun. You may have seen him on the series David Diamondhands, OFTV, or as the HR guy in corporate training videos. General admission with a two-item minimum.

shows.name: Ahmed Al-Kadri at DC Improv
shows.desc: Four shows over two nights in the Lounge Showroom — Fri Nov 6 (7:30 & 9:45 PM) and Sat Nov 7 (7:00 & 9:30 PM). Ahmed Al-Kadri is a Yemeni-American comedian based in LA; you may have seen him on David Diamondhands, OFTV, or in his YouTube special “Special Not Special.” Two-item minimum.

shows.name: Ahmed Al-Kadri Live in New Orleans
shows.desc: Laugh Life Comedy presents Ahmed Al-Kadri live at The Howlin' Wolf. Tables for 2 ($70), tables for 4 ($140), or GA seating ($25). No flash photography, video recording, or heckling — all sales final.
shows.address: 907 S Peters St., New Orleans, LA
